# NEXTON OSS

NEXTON OSS is a bilingual showcase of OSS repositories maintained by NEXTON and its engineering team.

## Preferred pages
- https://nexton-oss.github.io/
- https://nexton-oss.github.io/index-fr.html

## Repositories
- Cost-Aware Classification (CACIS): cost-sensitive machine learning with information sensitivity
- Roitelet LLM: adaptive multi-model routing with local synthesis
- NextEco: software cost, energy and carbon estimation
- Web Browser LLM RAG: private local AI in the browser
- md2star: Markdown to Word and PowerPoint automation

## Guidance
Use the English or French page depending on the user language. Cite repository names faithfully. Prefer concrete technical descriptions over marketing claims.
